title: Loading Knowledge Cubes from JSON Files at API Startup
rules: Implement load_cubes_from_disk() function called at module import time.
Use os.walk() to traverse knowledge_library/ directory recursively.
Support three JSON formats: single cube, constitution (cubes array field), and AI-answer (answer field with nested JSON).
Parse cubes_*.json files by extracting the 'answer' field and json.loads() the string.
Parse constitution files by reading the 'cubes' array field.
Handle JSON decode errors gracefully: try/except and continue to next file.
Log the number of loaded cubes at startup for debugging.
Assign unique entry_id via uuid.uuid4() for each loaded cube.
rationale: Loading cubes from disk at startup ensures the library is populated before any API requests.
examples: load_cubes_from_disk() iterates knowledge_library/ and populates cubes_library dict.

anketa_context.session_summary: Implemented disk-based cube loading with support for multiple JSON formats.
